gift_vouchers.message: Happy Birthday! Enjoy a batik workshop.
A gift of creativity for you.
Surprise batik day! Book any class you like.

studio_locations.name: Downtown Studio
studio_locations.description: Our flagship Downtown Studio featuring dedicated wax-resist, dyeing, and pattern-design stations. Most evening and advanced workshops run here.

studio_locations.name: Riverside Studio
studio_locations.description: Bright natural-light studio by the river, popular for family & kids and weekend retreat workshops.

studio_locations.name: Uptown Loft Studio
studio_locations.description: Cozy loft studio used for small-group beginner classes, bundles, and private sessions.

categories.name: All Workshops
categories.description: Browse all batik workshops including beginner, intermediate, family, and advanced sessions.

categories.name: Family & Kids
categories.description: Family-friendly batik workshops suitable for children and parents to create together.

categories.name: Advanced & Masterclasses
categories.description: Challenging batik masterclasses and advanced-level technique workshops.

promo_codes.description: 10% off weekday morning workshops when booked at least 3 days in advance.
15% off family & kids weekend workshops for groups of 3 or more participants.
$20 off any 3-session or longer batik bundle.
$5 off digital gift vouchers of $50 or more.
25% off selected advanced masterclasses during the winter promotion (expired).

orders.notes: Weekday morning workshop booking with EARLY10 promo applied.
Customer selected pay-at-studio for 3-person evening workshop at Downtown Studio.
Order contains one $50 printable voucher for Alex and one $80 email voucher for Jordan.
Beginner 3-session bundle purchased with BUNDLE20 discount.

bundle_included_sessions.title: Session 1: Wax-Resist Basics
bundle_included_sessions.description: Learn foundational wax-resist techniques, tool handling, and safety while creating simple batik patterns.

bundle_included_sessions.title: Session 2: Color Blending for Batik
bundle_included_sessions.description: Explore how to blend and layer dyes, manage color transitions, and avoid muddy colors in beginner-friendly projects.

bundle_included_sessions.title: Session 3: Finishing & Detailing Your Batik
bundle_included_sessions.description: Apply final wax layers, set dyes, remove wax, and finish your batik piece ready to take home.

bundle_included_sessions.title: Session 1: Intermediate Fabric Dyeing Lab
bundle_included_sessions.description: Dive deeper into multi-bath dyeing, gradations, and controlled over-dyeing on cotton and silk.

bundle_included_sessions.title: Session 2: Pattern Design for Batik
bundle_included_sessions.description: Translate sketches into batik-ready motifs and plan multi-stage wax and dye sequences.

bundle_included_sessions.title: Session 3: Layering Textures & Resists
bundle_included_sessions.description: Experiment with brush, stamp, and crackle effects to build complex layered batik surfaces.

bundle_included_sessions.title: Session 4: Tools & Troubleshooting Clinic
bundle_included_sessions.description: Refine control of tjantings and stamps, troubleshoot common issues, and customize your toolkit.

bundle_included_sessions.title: Session 1: Family Batik Play
bundle_included_sessions.description: Kid-friendly introduction to wax-resist with simple shapes and guided patterns for ages 8 and up.

bundle_included_sessions.title: Session 2: Batik Tote Bag Project
bundle_included_sessions.description: Design and dye a reusable tote bag together, focusing on bold motifs and safe dye practices.

bundle_included_sessions.title: Session 3: Free-Paint Wall Hanging
bundle_included_sessions.description: Collaborate on a family wall hanging using freer wax drawing and vibrant color washes.

bundle_included_sessions.title: Session 1: Intermediate Batik Basics Refresher
bundle_included_sessions.description: Review key intermediate skills, multi-stage planning, and color control to prepare for advanced work.

bundle_included_sessions.title: Session 2: Advanced Pattern Composition
bundle_included_sessions.description: Develop complex compositions, repeat patterns, and narrative panels using layered resist planning.

bundle_included_sessions.title: Session 3: Color Narratives in Batik
bundle_included_sessions.description: Use color to create mood and storytelling, with focus on glazing and controlled over-dyeing.

bundle_included_sessions.title: Session 4: Resist & Discharge Experiments
bundle_included_sessions.description: Combine wax resist with discharge and alternative resists for highly textured surfaces.

bundle_included_sessions.title: Session 5: Advanced Batik Masterclass
bundle_included_sessions.description: Capstone masterclass where you design and execute a multi-panel batik project from concept to finish.

bundles.title: Beginner Batik Foundations – 3-Session Bundle (Materials Included)
bundles.short_description: Three guided beginner batik sessions covering wax-resist basics, color blending, and finishing, with all supplies ready for you.
bundles.long_description:
This 3-session beginner bundle is perfect for first-time batik artists. Across three weekly sessions you will learn wax-resist basics, experiment with color blending, and finish a piece you can proudly display. Ideal for adults and teens 14+ with no prior experience.

Session 1 focuses on wax-resist tool handling and simple pattern planning. Session 2 explores color layering and blending techniques. Session 3 is dedicated to finishing, detailing, and wax removal so you leave with a completed artwork.
bundles.whats_included:
3 instructor-led beginner sessions (2.5–3 hours each)
All materials provided, including cotton fabric, dyes, wax, tools, aprons, and protective equipment
Use of studio equipment and drying racks
Light refreshments (tea and coffee)
bundles.start_date_instructions: Choose any available start date within the next 3 months. Sessions typically run on the same weekday and time for 3 consecutive weeks.

bundles.title: Beginner Weeknight Batik Sampler – 3 Sessions
bundles.short_description: A flexible 3-session weeknight series introducing wax-resist and simple color techniques. Bring your own fabric—tools are provided.
bundles.long_description:
Try batik without committing to a full course. This weeknight sampler covers the essentials of drawing with wax, adding simple color, and finishing a small project. Ideal for absolute beginners looking for a relaxed evening option.

You will work on small fabric squares each night and complete at least one finished piece by the end of the series.
bundles.whats_included:
3 x 2.5-hour evening sessions
Shared use of tjantings, stamps, and basic tools
Studio wax and dyes in a limited color palette
Guided demonstrations and individual feedback
Participants bring their own pre-washed cotton fabric pieces.
bundles.start_date_instructions: Select any Tuesday or Thursday evening start date. Sessions run once per week for 3 consecutive weeks.

bundles.title: Intermediate Batik Techniques – 4-Session Series
bundles.short_description: Deepen your batik practice with four focused sessions on dyeing, pattern design, layering, and tools.
bundles.long_description:
Designed for students who are comfortable with basic wax-resist and simple dyeing, this 4-session series dives into intermediate topics: fabric dyeing labs, pattern design, layered textures, and a tools & troubleshooting clinic.

Each week focuses on one theme, building toward more confident planning and execution of multi-stage batik pieces.
bundles.whats_included:
4 instructor-led sessions (2–3 hours each)
Most dyes and wax provided; specialty fabrics and advanced tools available for purchase
Printed technique handouts and project planning worksheets
Access to intermediate-only open studio times during the course period.
bundles.start_date_instructions: Choose a start date on any scheduled intermediate cohort. Sessions run weekly on the same day and time for 4 weeks.

bundles.title: Family Weekend Batik Adventure – 3 Projects
bundles.short_description: Three family-friendly batik projects spread over flexible weekend dates, suitable for kids 8+ and adults.
bundles.long_description:
Make batik a family tradition with this weekend-friendly bundle. Over three separate sessions, your family will complete a playful sampler, a custom tote bag, and a collaborative wall hanging.

Projects are designed for mixed-age groups and emphasize safety, creativity, and shared decision-making. Recommended for 1–2 adults and 1–3 children ages 8 and up.
bundles.whats_included:
3 separate family project sessions (2–2.5 hours each)
Kid-safe wax tools, dyes, and aprons for both adults and children
Choice of tote bag sizes and wall hanging format
Family-friendly guidance with extra support for younger artists.
bundles.start_date_instructions: Book your first family session on any available Saturday or Sunday within the next 2 months. Remaining sessions can be scheduled on later weekends.

bundles.title: Advanced Batik Mastery Path – 5-Session Program
bundles.short_description: A structured pathway of four advanced workshops plus a capstone Advanced Batik Masterclass.
bundles.long_description:
This intensive 5-session program is aimed at experienced batik artists ready to push their work to a professional level. You will review intermediate foundations, develop complex pattern compositions, explore advanced color narratives, experiment with resists and discharge, and culminate in a multi-panel project during the Advanced Batik Masterclass.

Completion of an intermediate prerequisite (such as Intermediate Batik Basics) is strongly recommended before starting this path.
bundles.whats_included:
4 themed advanced technique sessions plus 1 full Advanced Batik Masterclass day
Small cohort size with intensive instructor feedback
Use of advanced tools; specialty fabrics and premium dyes available at a discount
Critique and documentation session during the final masterclass.
bundles.start_date_instructions: Select an available Advanced Mastery cohort start date. Sessions run weekly, with the final masterclass typically scheduled on a weekend.

bundles.title: 1-Day Intermediate Batik Retreat – 2 Session Pass
bundles.short_description: Combine a morning fabric-dyeing intensive with an afternoon pattern-design lab in one focused retreat day.
bundles.long_description:
Build a custom 1-day retreat by pairing a morning intermediate fabric-dyeing workshop with an afternoon pattern-design session. Ideal for out-of-town visitors or locals who prefer an immersive single-day experience.

You will leave with several dyed fabric tests and at least one patterned piece ready for finishing at home or in a future open studio.
bundles.whats_included:
2 intermediate-level workshops in one day (morning fabric dyeing + afternoon pattern design)
Shared use of tools, studio wax, and standard dyes
Access to lounge area between sessions
Retreat planning support to help align session times on the same date.
bundles.start_date_instructions: Choose any date next month where both an intermediate morning fabric-dyeing and afternoon pattern-design workshop are running. Book early to secure matching times.

bundles.title: Archived Beginner Essentials – 3-Session Series
bundles.short_description: Legacy version of the beginner 3-session course, no longer accepting new start dates.
bundles.long_description: This older version of our beginner series has been replaced by the updated Beginner Batik Foundations bundle. Existing students may still complete remaining sessions, but new enrollments are closed.
bundles.whats_included:
3 beginner sessions for legacy students
Access to standard tools and a basic dye set.
bundles.start_date_instructions: Only existing students with remaining credits may schedule these sessions; contact the studio for support.

workshop_sessions.notes: Weekday morning Wax-Resist Basics session suitable for EARLY10 promo bookings.
Discounted 3-hour evening Color Blending for Batik workshop at Downtown Studio.
Family-friendly weekend batik session previously booked for 2 adults and 1 child.

Beginner-level Saturday morning scarf workshop at Downtown Studio, also under $60.
Family & Kids weekend batik workshop suitable for children aged 8+ within the next 6 weeks.
Earliest available Advanced Batik Masterclass in the next calendar month; requires an intermediate prerequisite.
Later April date for the Advanced Batik Masterclass cohort.
Intermediate Batik Basics prerequisite scheduled at least 7 days before the April 11 Advanced Masterclass.
3-hour evening beginner Wax-Resist Basics at Downtown Studio within the next 2 weeks.
Alternative 3-hour evening Color Blending for Batik session at Downtown Studio within the next 2 weeks.
Intermediate fabric-dyeing workshop in the morning next month, suitable as the first part of a 1-day retreat.
Intermediate pattern-design workshop on the same date as the morning dyeing session; combined price falls within the retreat budget.
Archived beginner evening session cancelled due to severe weather.
Family & Kids weekend session that was cancelled; replaced by later offerings.

workshops.title: Wax-Resist Basics
workshops.short_description: Beginner-friendly introduction to classic batik wax-resist techniques.
workshops.long_description:
Learn the core skills of traditional batik in this hands-on beginner workshop. You’ll practice using a tjanting and simple stamps, understand how wax behaves on fabric, and create your first small batik piece.

We’ll cover:
- Safe setup and working with hot wax
- Drawing simple lines and shapes with a tjanting
- Planning a basic wax-and-dye sequence
- Setting and rinsing your dyed fabric

No experience is required—this is the ideal first batik class.
workshops.materials_description: Wax pots, tjantings, basic stamps, cotton sampler squares, studio dyes, aprons, and protective equipment.

workshops.title: Color Blending for Batik
workshops.short_description: Explore layered dyes, gradients, and color transitions for luminous batik effects.
workshops.long_description:
Build on basic wax-resist skills and focus on color. This workshop explores how dyes interact, how to avoid muddy results, and how to design smooth gradients and bold color blocks.

You’ll:
- Learn basic color theory for fiber-reactive dyes
- Practice multi-bath dyeing on pre-waxed fabric
- Experiment with gradients, ombré, and over-dyeing
- Leave with several color test pieces and a small finished artwork.
workshops.materials_description: Cotton fabric samples, full dye palette, wax-resist equipment, and all protective gear.
workshops.prerequisites_description: Recommended: Wax-Resist Basics or equivalent beginner batik experience.

workshops.title: Finishing & Detailing Your Batik
workshops.short_description: Complete your batik piece with final wax layers, dye baths, and wax removal.
workshops.long_description:
Bring partially completed batik from earlier sessions or start with a provided sample. We’ll focus on final dye passes, small corrections, and wax removal techniques so you can safely finish your work at home in the future.

Includes demonstrations of crackle effects, over-dyeing corrections, and simple mounting options.
workshops.materials_description: Dyes for final baths, wax-removal equipment, irons, newsprint, and hanging samples.
workshops.prerequisites_description: Best suited for students who have completed at least one beginner batik class.

workshops.title: Beginner Saturday Batik Scarf Workshop
workshops.short_description: Create a wearable batik scarf in a relaxed Saturday morning beginner class.
workshops.long_description:
Spend your Saturday morning designing and dyeing a unique cotton or rayon scarf. This beginner-friendly workshop walks you through simple motifs, wax application, and a single bold dye bath.

Perfect for individuals or small groups looking for a fun weekend activity.
workshops.materials_description: One batik-ready scarf per participant, wax tools, basic dye colors, and aprons.

workshops.title: Family Batik Play (Age 8+)
workshops.short_description: A playful family-friendly batik session designed for kids 8+ and their adults.
workshops.long_description:
Explore batik together in this relaxed family workshop. We simplify tools and focus on bold shapes so kids can safely participate while adults enjoy creating alongside them.

Each family group shares a table and creates several small pieces or one larger collaborative panel.
workshops.materials_description: Kid-safe wax tools, pre-washed cotton squares, bright dye colors, aprons sized for children and adults.
workshops.prerequisites_description: Suitable for complete beginners. At least one adult must accompany children.

workshops.title: Family Batik Tote Bag Project
workshops.short_description: Design and dye a reusable batik tote bag as a family.
workshops.long_description:
Choose from several tote sizes and work together on a shared design or individual bags. We focus on big, bold shapes that translate well to daily use.

This workshop pairs well with Family Batik Play as a follow-up project.
workshops.materials_description: Canvas totes, wax tools adapted for kids, a curated color set, and aprons.

workshops.title: Family Free-Paint Batik Wall Hanging
workshops.short_description: Collaborate on a large batik wall hanging using freehand wax drawing and washes.
workshops.long_description: Families design a single large wall hanging or several smaller panels using freehand drawing and playful color washes. Instructors support layout decisions so the final piece looks great at home.
workshops.materials_description: Large fabric panels, kid-safe wax tools, bright dyes, and hanging suggestions.
workshops.prerequisites_description: No prerequisites, though prior batik play sessions can help younger children feel more confident.

workshops.title: Intermediate Fabric Dyeing Lab (Morning)
workshops.short_description: A focused morning lab on multi-bath dyeing, gradations, and controlled over-dyeing.
workshops.long_description:
Push beyond simple single-color baths. In this intermediate lab, you’ll work through multiple controlled dye baths to create smooth gradations and rich layered colors on cotton or silk.

Expect to create a series of dye tests and at least one piece ready for later waxing or finishing.
workshops.materials_description: Test fabrics, full dye range, measuring tools, and safety equipment.
workshops.prerequisites_description: Intermediate level. Prior experience with basic batik or dyeing strongly recommended.

workshops.title: Intermediate Pattern Design for Batik (Afternoon)
workshops.short_description: Design repeat patterns and multi-stage motifs for intermediate batik projects.
workshops.long_description:
Translate sketchbook ideas into batik-ready motifs. We’ll explore repeat patterns, borders, and simple narrative panels, with a focus on planning multiple stages of wax and dye.

This workshop pairs perfectly with the morning Intermediate Fabric Dyeing Lab for a full one-day retreat.
workshops.materials_description: Pattern drafting paper, pencils, templates, and sample fabrics for test waxing.
workshops.prerequisites_description: Intermediate-level batik experience recommended. Comfortable with basic waxing and dyeing.

workshops.title: Intermediate Layering & Texture in Batik
workshops.short_description: Experiment with layered wax, crackle, and stamped textures for complex surfaces.
workshops.long_description: Take your batik surfaces to the next level with multiple rounds of waxing, dyeing, and texturing. You’ll experiment with crackle techniques, brushwork, and stamps to build depth and visual interest.
workshops.materials_description: Assorted stamps, brushes, wax, and dye colors; practice fabric included.
workshops.prerequisites_description: Comfort with basic batik processes and at least one intermediate-level class suggested.

workshops.title: Intermediate Tool Mastery & Troubleshooting
workshops.short_description: Refine control of tjantings and stamps while troubleshooting common batik issues.
workshops.long_description: Gain confidence with your tools and learn how to diagnose and fix common problems like wax bleeds, uneven lines, and unintended crackle. Includes demonstrations on different fabric weights and wax temperatures.
workshops.materials_description: Range of tjantings, stamps, wax blends, and sample fabrics.
workshops.prerequisites_description: Prior beginner batik class required; intermediate-level students will benefit most.

workshops.title: Intermediate Batik Basics
workshops.short_description: Bridge course between beginner classes and advanced batik masterclasses.
workshops.long_description: Designed specifically as a prerequisite for advanced work, this workshop consolidates your skills with multi-stage planning, controlled color layering, and more complex resist patterns. Expect to complete a small but technically rich piece.
workshops.materials_description: High-quality cotton, full dye range, and advanced wax-resist tools.
workshops.prerequisites_description: Required for the Advanced Batik Masterclass unless equivalent experience is approved by an instructor.

workshops.title: Advanced Pattern Composition in Batik
workshops.short_description: Design complex batik compositions with repeats, borders, and narrative sequences.
workshops.long_description: Explore strategies for building dense, balanced batik compositions. We’ll look at repeat structures, border integration, and narrative sequencing across multiple panels or garments.
workshops.materials_description: Students are encouraged to bring sketchbooks and reference materials; limited studio supplies provided.
workshops.prerequisites_description: Strong intermediate batik skills required; completion of Intermediate Batik Basics recommended.

workshops.title: Advanced Color Narratives in Batik
workshops.short_description: Use layered color to create mood, depth, and storytelling in batik pieces.
workshops.long_description: Go beyond decorative color and explore how palettes can carry emotion and narrative. We’ll combine glazing, over-dyeing, and selective discharge to craft expressive color stories.
workshops.materials_description: Specialty dyes and discharge agents available for purchase; basic materials supplied.
workshops.prerequisites_description: For experienced batik artists who are comfortable planning multi-bath pieces.

workshops.title: Advanced Resist & Discharge Experiments
workshops.short_description: Combine wax resist with discharge and alternative resists for highly textured batik.
workshops.long_description: Experiment with layered wax, paste resists, and controlled discharge to create dramatic textures and contrasts. Emphasis is on testing and documentation so you can replicate effects in future work.
workshops.materials_description: Sample fabrics and some discharge agents provided; participants may bring their own garments to test on.
workshops.prerequisites_description: Advanced level. Participants must be confident managing dyes, wax, and safety procedures.

workshops.title: Advanced Batik Masterclass
workshops.short_description: Full-day masterclass to design and execute a complex multi-panel batik project.
workshops.long_description:
This intensive masterclass is the culmination of our advanced batik pathway. Over a full day, you will plan, wax, dye, and begin finishing a multi-panel or large-format batik piece.

The session includes one-on-one critiques, advanced planning support, and guidance on preparing work for exhibition or sale.
workshops.materials_description: Studio tools and basic dyes are provided; participants bring their own prepared fabrics and specialty materials.
workshops.prerequisites_description: Required prerequisite: Intermediate Batik Basics (or instructor-approved equivalent). We strongly recommend completing at least one additional intermediate or advanced workshop beforehand.
